overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a character in period clothing with a tricorn hat walking along a coastal cliff path that transitions to a sandy beach during golden hour. The environment features dramatic rocky cliffs, ocean views, wildflowers, and warm sunset lighting with the sun appearing in the final moments.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside walking trail between rock wall and ocean drop

agents.ego_description: character in period clothing walking steadily along the narrow cliffside dirt path

entered.detail: tall layered rock formation with gray-brown texture forming the right boundary of the path
calm sea visible beyond the cliff edge to the left
narrow winding trail with patches of grass and dirt
green grass and vegetation lining the left side of the path
clusters of purple flowers growing along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging a rocky cliff face on the right, with tall grass and purple wildflowers lining the path. The ocean is visible in the distance to the left, and the warm golden hour light casts long shadows across the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from cliff path to open beach

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt and grass to sandy terrain as the beach opens up

agents.ego_description: character continues walking forward as the path widens and becomes sandier

entered.detail: large isolated rock formation standing in the water off the coast
beach sand replacing the dirt path with visible ripple patterns

segments.scene_description: The path gradually opens up and transitions from dirt to sand, with the cliff face receding to the mid-distance. A distinctive sea stack becomes visible in the ocean ahead, and the vegetation shifts with wildflowers appearing on the right side of the widening beach path.

events.description: sun becomes visible above the distant cliffs creating strong backlighting and silhouette effect

agents.ego_description: character walking toward the setting sun along the expansive beach with long shadow cast ahead

entered.detail: bright sun sitting low on the horizon creating golden hour lighting
cliff headland extending into the sea on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sandy beach with the sun now visible low on the horizon, creating a strong backlight that silhouettes the character. The cliff face has receded into the distance, revealing the full expanse of the coastline with the sea stack and distant headland visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal cliffside that gradually opens into a wide, sun-drenched beach. It begins with a character walking a narrow dirt trail hugged by a rocky cliff face, where tall grass and purple wildflowers sway under the long shadows of the golden hour. As the path widens, the terrain transitions from dirt to sand and the cliff face recedes, bringing a distinctive sea stack into view across the ocean. The scene then expands into a vast sandy shoreline as the sun emerges low on the horizon, casting a strong backlight that silhouettes the character. Finally, the perspective reveals the full expanse of the coastline, with the distant headland and sea stack framed against the glowing sunset.
